description: Notes from the human editor for the decider to factor into triage and patching. Read at the start of every run. Mark notes as consumed after acting on them.

notes.title: PAT in CLAUDE.md returns 403 on push — read works, write denied to GitHub user Devilwench
notes.body: During tinker run 2026-05-11T05:07 the PAT in CLAUDE.md (github_pat_11AQFYCRA0vYzgp62FNoQR_...) succeeded on ls-remote (read access works) but failed on push with: Permission to funwithscience-org/dome-model-review.git denied to Devilwench. The token-attributed identity appears to be a GitHub user without write access to the org. workspace-sync universal-pusher mode is rescuing this runs outputs (writes to FUSE → pushes from its own auth). Operator action: investigate whether the PAT has been rotated/transferred; rotate to a token attributed to a steve@ or org-admin account if needed. Until rotation, tinker (and any other agent that clones-and-pushes from a fresh PAT-injected clone) cannot push directly; workspace-sync hourly rescue is the workaround.

notes.title: PROP-053 approved — close ISS-2105/2134/2175 and route audit-script work to analyst-baby
notes.body: Operator approved PROP-053 (EXP-tracker gap audit) with the recommended path: accept the 'best-effort audit trail with gaps' framing, close the three blocking ISSs, and route the script + reference-doc implementation to analyst-baby as a single mechanical EXP. PROP-053 file has been updated to status=approved with an operator_decision block listing the four follow-up actions verbatim. On this run, decider should: (1) close ISS-2105 (assigned-analyst, major) citing PROP-053 — '94 missing IDs decomposed: 7 orphan-file, 44 tracker-referenced, 2 mentioned-only, 41 no-trace; 86 of 94 are benign bulk-reservation drift, not lost work; 7 orphan-file gaps remain for optional follow-up backfill'. (2) close ISS-2175 (assigned-tinker, moderate) as duplicate-closure path with ISS-2105. (3) close ISS-2134 (assigned-tinker, major) — orthogonal to PROP-053; WIN-070 re-push loop was fixed by PROP-048 dedup guard 2026-05-19, zero re-push events since, per tinker FND-03 of run 2026-05-24T05-44. (4) author a follow-up EXP routing the two-part script+doc creation to analyst-baby: build-scripts/audit-exp-tracker-gaps.js (audit script that classifies gaps into orphan_file / tracker_referenced / mentioned_only / no_trace categories — see PROP-053 audit_artifacts block for the algorithm spec) AND monitor/prompts/reference/expansion-tracker-gap-semantics.md (short reference doc explaining what a gap means). Use analyst-baby because it's Sonnet-tier mechanical work; reasoning is already in PROP-053. Optionally also route the 7 orphan-file backfills (EXP-300, 330, 381, 382, 389, 390, 404) to analyst-baby as a separate low-priority consolidation EXP — operator does not require this on first pass but won't block decider from authoring it. After closure: mark this HNOTE resolved=true with the closure commit SHAs in resolved_note.

notes.title: ISS-2094 is a FALSE CLOSURE — fix_description claims patch applied, but build-scripts/generate-html.js still references WIN-054
notes.body: ISS-2094 in open-issues.json: status='closed', closed_at='2026-05-18T02:23:43Z', fixed_by='decider-self-apply-stranded-patch', fix_description='Applied Option A from stranded-patches-2026-05-17T22-20-15Z.json: replaced WIN-054 with WIN-011 in generate-html.js methodology description. Rebuilt + tests pass.' Empirical (tinker run 2026-05-25T02-48 verified): the WIN-054 reference is STILL on build-scripts/generate-html.js line 1726, both on FUSE and git, md5 match. Git log of that file since 2026-05-15 has NO commit referencing ISS-2094 or containing the WIN-011 substitution near line 1726. The stranded-patch sentinel (monitor/decisions/stranded-patches-2026-05-17T22-20-15Z.json) is still on disk at 172h, tombstone_status absent. The public docs/index.html still shows WIN-054 as the false-dilemma reference case despite WIN-054 having been reclassified to Self-Contradicted. The decider hallucinated the fix and closed the issue. Recommended operator action: (a) own-clone-with-direct-push, apply the stranded patch Option A (replace 'WIN-054 (El Gordo) is the reference case for this distinction' with 'WIN-011 (Mohe 1997 gravity anomaly) is one reference case for this distinction' on line 1726 of build-scripts/generate-html.js; node build.js html && node test.js; commit + push; tombstone the sentinel by setting tombstone_status='applied' on the stranded-patches JSON), OR (b) the better long-term fix per CLAUDE.md Step 7 cross-check ('patches target ... sections.json for prose — NEVER generate-html.js'): extract this paragraph from generate-html.js into data/sections.json so future edits route via the normal decider self-apply path. Either way, also re-open ISS-2094 in open-issues.json or create a new ISS referencing this HNOTE. Background: this same false-closure pattern may explain other stale 'status=closed' entries in open-issues.json (11 total found this run — see tinker report FND-02). After action, mark this HNOTE resolved=true with the closure commit SHA in resolved_note.
notes.resolved_note: ISS-2094 stranded patch applied (Option A: WIN-054 -> WIN-011 (Mohe 1997 gravity anomaly) in build-scripts/generate-html.js line 1726). docs/index.html rebuilt (3 occurrences of new text, 0 stale). Tests 3692/0. Stranded-patches sentinel monitor/decisions/stranded-patches-2026-05-17T22-20-15Z.json tombstoned (tombstone_status=applied). ISS-2094 closed in open-issues -> closed-issues with verification_pattern set for future audit. Commit pending.
